summary: Validate hado_styles.css source and deployed asset size/content so missing, empty, or truncated CSS cannot pass preview checks.
bugClassification: Preview CSS asset content validation gap
rootCause: Live preview inspection showed hado_styles.css was not a valid full stylesheet. Previous checks verified references/snippets but did not validate the source CSS before dispatch or require a minimum deployed CSS size, so a missing/truncated CSS asset could still slip through until browser devtools showed 404 or an unusable asset.
externalizationDecision: No HTML/source CSS change. The fix adds source and deployed CSS asset content/size validation.
workflowResult: pending-after-push; workflow now fails before dispatch if source CSS is missing/truncated and after publish if deployed CSS is missing/truncated
minimumUserAcceptance: After push, confirm live preview hado_styles.css is HTTP 200 and at least 100KB, and the page renders styled.
